who: logistics coordinators for Amazon sellers processing 10–50 shipments/day
offer: For logistics coordinators for Amazon sellers processing 10–50 shipments/day, delayed shipment notifications cause missed delivery deadlines. We provide real-time exception alerts instead of manual tracking of shipment statuses through multiple platforms.
problem: Delayed shipment notifications leading to missed delivery deadlines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics coordinators
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics coordinators with demo video
Share insights in community forums for logistics tools
try_it: Let users try real-time shipment status monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
